allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) cns=[p.get\('cn','?'\) for p in d.get\('presentaciones',[]\)] print\(f\\" nombre: {d.get\('nombre','?'\)}\\"\) print\(f\\" lab: {d.get\('labtitular','?'\)}\\"\) print\(f\\" psum: {d.get\('psum',False\)}\\"\) print\(f\\" comerc: {d.get\('comerc',False\)}\\"\) print\(f\\" CNs: {cns}\\"\) print\(f\\" FT: {next\(\(x['urlHtml'] for x in d.get\('docs',[]\) if x['tipo']==1\),'N/A'\)}\\"\) " done)

Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for p in d.get\('presentaciones',[]\): print\(f\\" CN={p.get\('cn'\)} | {p.get\('nombre','?'\)[:80]} | comerc={p.get\('comerc',False\)} | psum={p.get\('psum',False\)}\\"\) " done)

Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for p in d.get\('presentaciones',[]\): if p.get\('comerc',False\): print\(f\\" CN={p.get\('cn'\)} | {p.get\('nombre','?'\)} | psum={p.get\('psum',False\)}\\"\) " done)
